Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}Tonight, we're infiltrating the campus. Our objective is to rescue Fuuka Yamagishi.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Um, I don't get it. Are you sayin' Yamagishi is inside the school somewhere?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}And why are we doing this at night? At midnight, this place turns into—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}That's how Yamagishi wandered into Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Wait, you mean Yamagishi-san's been over there ever since she got locked in the gym?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}But that was ten days ago![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 3 25 25}No matter how you look at it, she's gotta be...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Tartarus only appears during the Dark Hour. So where does it go for the rest of the day?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}This is just a theory, but I think time flows differently in Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}So even though it's been ten days for us, it could have only been ten hours for her.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}There's a chance she's still alive.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}But wait, isn't the Dark Hour pretty brutal though? Even for us?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}How could she last ten days' worth in there?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}And, even if she is still alive, we might not be able to get to her.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Are you just gonna abandon her then!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Let's try to enter Tartarus the same way Yamagishi did.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}We'll go to the gym and wait for midnight. That'll be the quickest way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Is that really gonna work?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}In all honesty, I can't say I fully agree with this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}If something goes wrong, you could all end up lost in Tartarus too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}I'm not just gonna stand here and do nothing if there's a chance we can save her.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}If you guys aren't with me, then I'm going in on my own.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}We know it's risky, but we also can't just leave her there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}Right. And we won't know until we try.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Guess we're sneakin' into the school then![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}Heheh. In that case, I've got just the thing.[n]{f 1 1}
